name: Obsidian
description: Connect local Obsidian vaults so Prometheus can index Markdown notes and optionally write selected memories back to a vault.

permissions.label: Index Markdown notes from selected vaults
Write back only in assisted or full mode
Promote tagged notes into operational memory

setup.docsHint: Paste the absolute path to a local Obsidian vault. Prometheus never scans a vault until you connect it.
